title: ResearchStrategy V1
description: A reusable research strategy template defining methodology, constraints, and validation criteria. Content-addressed via SHA-256 of RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical JSON.

schema_version.description: Schema version, must be 1 for this version.

strategy_id.description: Content-addressed identifier: SHA-256 hex digest of RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical JSON of this object excluding strategy_id itself.

objective.description: What this strategy aims to achieve.

approach.description: Research method or technique. Examples: 'symbolic perturbation analysis', 'variational simulation', 'formal proof via Lean', 'dispersive reconstruction'.

model.description: Theoretical framework or model (e.g., 'effective field theory', 'Ising model', 'homotopy type theory').

parameter_ranges.description: Valid parameter ranges for this strategy.

approximations.description: Approximations used and their validity conditions.

assumptions.description: Domain-specific assumptions. Examples: theory: 'scale separation holds', 'symmetry is exact in this regime'; formal: 'excluded middle', 'axiom of choice'.

type.description: V1 quantity types cover numerical/computational domains. V2 will add 'boolean', 'symbolic', 'category' for formal methods and classification workflows (see DESIGN_DEBT.md item 6).

format.description: Expected result format. Recommended values: 'analytic_expression', 'numerical_table', 'parametric_fit', 'formal_proof', 'classification_result', 'mixed'. Domain Packs may define additional conventions.

expected_outcome_form.description: What form the results should take.

applicable_when.description: Conditions under which this strategy is applicable.

name.description: Criterion name (e.g., 'consistency_check', 'known_limit_check'). Domain Pack defines available criteria.

method.description: How to verify (e.g., 'compare results from two independent methods'). Domain Pack provides concrete verification procedures.

required.description: Whether this criterion is required for outcome verification.

validation_criteria.description: Criteria for verifying outcomes produced by this strategy.

preset.description: Strategy preset category for signal engine.
